title: How BarkinMad Coins Connect the ZX Series
content: BarkinMad Coins are designed to bring the growing ZX Series together through a shared progression system that rewards players for spending time across multiple games.

Rather than each title existing in isolation, BarkinMad Coins create a connection between games such as ZXSnake, ZXBrick, ZXSpace, and future ZX Series releases. Players can earn coins while playing supported games and build a wallet that follows them throughout the collection.

The goal behind BarkinMad Coins is simple. Every game played should contribute towards a player's overall progress within the ZX ecosystem. Whether chasing high scores, unlocking achievements, or exploring new titles, players are rewarded for their time and dedication.

As additional ZX Series games are released, the value of a shared progression system becomes even more important. Players who enjoy multiple games can continue building their coin balance while experiencing different styles of arcade gameplay.

BarkinMad Coins also support the wider vision of the ZX Series. While each game remains unique, shared systems such as achievements, leaderboards, player progression, and coins help create a connected experience across the collection.
The system has been designed to grow alongside the ZX Series. Future updates may introduce additional ways to earn coins, new progression opportunities, and expanded integration between games.

For BarkinMad Studios, BarkinMad Coins represent another step towards creating a unified arcade gaming experience. As the ZX Series continues to expand, players can expect shared features that reward loyalty, encourage exploration, and make every game feel part of a larger journey.
More updates on BarkinMad Coins and future ZX Series features will be shared as development continues.
